name: Bitsight
description: Bitsight is a cybersecurity ratings platform that provides data-driven security ratings and risk analytics. This integration monitors your organization's security rating, risk vectors, vulnerability findings, alerting configuration, and third-party portfolio coverage.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to the Bitsight Security Ratings Platform at https://service.bitsight.com
2. Go to Settings (gear icon) > Account > User Preferences
3. Under 'User API Token' or 'Company API Token', generate a new token
4. Copy the token and paste it here

Note: Company API tokens provide broader access than user tokens and are not user-specific. API tokens should be treated as passwords.

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Your BitSight API token. Find it in the BitSight platform under Settings > Account > User Preferences > API Token.

checks.name: Bitsight Security Rating
checks.description: Verifies that the organization's Bitsight security rating is retrieved and meets acceptable thresholds. A rating below 640 indicates significant security risk.

checks.name: Bitsight Risk Vector Assessment
checks.description: Evaluates the organization's Bitsight risk vector grades across security categories (Compromised Systems, Diligence, User Behavior, Public Disclosures). Flags any risk vectors graded D or F.

checks.name: Bitsight Alerts Configuration
checks.description: Verifies that Bitsight alerting is active and configured. Checks for the presence of alert configurations to ensure security events are being monitored.

checks.name: Bitsight Portfolio Monitoring
checks.description: Verifies third-party risk monitoring by checking the Bitsight portfolio for monitored companies. Ensures vendors and third parties are being tracked for security risk.

checks.name: Bitsight Vulnerability Findings
checks.description: Checks for open vulnerability findings in the organization's Bitsight profile. Reviews diligence findings that may indicate security gaps in the infrastructure.
